artPrompt: An overeager goblin advisor in a crooked rosette and rolled-up sleeves leaping atop an overturned ballot box mid-election-night riot, one fist pumping the air, eyes wild with unpaid enthusiasm, a blank rolled placard clutched in the other hand. A nearby bonfire blasts ember-orange light across his grinning face, the rioting square dissolving into night-black smoke. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Campaign Volunteer
text:
Other Goblins you control get +1/+0.
Whenever Campaign Volunteer attacks, you may pay {R}. If you do, create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token tapped and attacking.
